data.name: Hentai Fetishes: Yuri
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Fetishes: Yuri is the fusion of classic arcade gameplay and tantalizing yuri-themed erotica! Immerse yourself in a relaxing yet thrilling experience where you break bricks to reveal stunning Hentai lesbian artwork.

Features:

  • Classic Arcade Fun: Enjoy a modern twist on the beloved breakout/brickbreaker/arkanoid gameplay. Smash through levels and watch the sensual scenes unfold.
  • 100 Achievements: Unlock an array of achievements as you progress through the game. Can you collect them all?
  • Relaxing Gameplay: Perfect for unwinding after a long day. If you're tired, press F to solve the level.
  • Extra Artwork: We're committed to enhancing your experience. We provide several Profile Images so you can showcase your love for the game. Trading Cards and Profile Backgrounds will be added as soon as we reach the required amount of sales.

data.short_description: Beautiful anime girls interacting with each other, on a relaxing arcade game to unwind after a long day.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 越南文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 3.0+ Compatible Card. Not compatible with most integrated graphics cards.
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 3.0+ Compatible Card. Not compatible with most integrated graphics cards.
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04 LTS+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 3.0+ Compatible Card. Not compatible with most integrated graphics cards.
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system.
